events.title: openai/codex 0.134.0
events.summaryText: ## New Features - Added search across local conversation history, including case-insensitive content matches with result previews. (#23519, #23921) - Made `--profile` the primary profile selector across CLI, TUI permissions, and sandbox flows, with legacy profile configs rejected through migration guidance. (#23708, #23883, #23890, #24051, #24055, #24059, #24067, #24110) - Improved MCP setup with per-server environment targeting and OAuth options for streamable HTTP servers. (#23583, #24120) ...

events.title: @openai/codex 0.134.0
events.summaryText: Codex CLI is a coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your computer.
